2279590.name: Blue Horizon 2: Persian Skies
2279590.description:
Story
Set in Middle East Ancient Antiquity, in a time when Kings ruled the lands and Genies ruled the skies. Be a Genie and fly your carpet Fight Sorcerers and creatures, discover ruins, caves and villages. Build up your inventory, craft items, find spells, and build Castles.

Early Access Gameplay

The game is in Early Access so we can get feedback to improve before the full release.

An ancient Genie have been awoken by the King of Persia! The Magic Lamp has been used and his wishes are your command, all for the Glory of Persia. Embark on quests set by the King anyway you can. To complete your quests, you will need to find lots of things, including Magic Spells, which will help you fly, fight, craft and build. You need natural resources for your building, health and mana replenishment too. Find them over the vast 200Km Square Open World Landscape, with different regions based on Antiquity of Persia, Greece and Egypt.

  • Fly, run or swim and Explore the vast desert, inside giant Pyramids, ruins, settlements, caves, tombs, temples and underwater sunken cities.

  • Follow the your Kings quests, talk to traders, towns folk, guards and nomads to further your quests for treasure and direction.

  • Gather resources from the world around you to enable you to create buildings and items.

  • Craft items you need on your journey to enable you to build Castles for shelter, storage and regeneration. There are over 70 building Pieces to find, all able to connect together to create huge unique fortresses, or destroy them to regain the raw materials for something else.

  • Dangers lurk everywhere - others do not take kindly to Genies or their Magic. Giant creatures, armies, insects nests, and rival Sorcerers will not welcome you. You will enter into even bigger boss fights with Ships, Colossuses and Giant Sandworms.

  • You are bound to your Lamp - you may not stray too far from it. The only way to reach further, is to find another one, once you found one, you can teleport between them. Top up your Health and Mana from Power Crystals, scattered around the land.

  • Upgrade your stats when you find Magic Spells which will make you more powerful to take on the most fiercest of enemies.

  • Manage your inventory of materials, crafted items, power boosts, high value and quest items. Find or create storage boxes to keep your treasures safe. Barter with traders to swap items to get what you need, or find another way to mine them automatically.

  • Save and load to continue your adventure from any Lamp you find.

  • Graphics, audio settings

  • 16x9 and 21x9 Aspect Ratio Support.

    Please Note - Game does Not contain any Loot boxes or In-game purchases with real money.

英语*
